Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Robert A. Hartley, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, NORTHSTAR EDUCATION FINANCE INC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) TRACE FOWLER, aka TRACEY FOWLER, an individual.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
John Schwingler sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $48,794.86
Pre-Judgment Interest: $8,341.92
Attorney's Fees: 0.00$
Costs: $527.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $57,663.78
Judgment signed in open court.
